CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_info (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "ready" BOOLEAN, "structureVersion" VARCHAR, "version" VARCHAR, "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure
INSERT INTO _content_info VALUES ('checksum_content', false, '86dKNc-_V5SOALAxWDKDb2sO1Amm38e8uOIKCYEAK-Q', 'v3.5.0--6aeJWet_7mfH1bG6DlxV5ggiQMiSH-ensEn4V-BsQuc', 'DhoXUaLaZ60ycJMlgHuKyH-33RaitrewRP9j3BWwtYY'); -- meta
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS _content_content; -- structure
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS _content_content (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, "title" VARCHAR, "body" TEXT, "description" VARCHAR, "extension" VARCHAR, "externalUrl" VARCHAR NULL, "image" VARCHAR DEFAULT '', "meta" TEXT, "navigation" TEXT DEFAULT true, "path" VARCHAR, "seo" TEXT DEFAULT '{}', "stem" VARCHAR, "tech" TEXT DEFAULT '[]', "__hash__" TEXT UNIQUE); -- structure

It''s more intuitive, type-safe, and often more performant than the old"],["p",{},"structural directives (*ngIf, *ngFor)."],["pre",{"className":"language-js shiki shiki-themes github-light Find a document in a collection.\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":19},["span",{"class":"sVt8B"},"db."],["span",{"class":"sScJk"},"getCollection"],["span",{"class":"sVt8B"},"("],["span",{"class":"sZZnC"},"\"user\""],["span",{"class":"sVt8B"},")."],["span",{"class":"sScJk"},"findOne"],["span",{"class":"sVt8B"},"({});\n"]]]],["video",{"src":"https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SCyyKT9bw_M&t=228s","width":"100%"}],["hr",{}],["p",{},"/"],["p",{},"1. @if - Conditional Rendering"],["p",{},"Replaces *ngIf. It looks like standard JavaScript/TypeScript logic."],["p",{},"1 @if (isLoggedIn()) {"],["p",{},"2 <user-profile />"],["p",{},"3 } @else if (hasError()) {"],["p",{},"4 <error-message />"],["p",{},"5 } @else {"],["p",{},"6 <login-button />"],["p",{},"7 }"],["p",{},"```"],["p",{},"```"],["p",{},"2. @for - List Rendering"],["p",{},"Replaces *ngFor. It requires a track expression, which significantly improves rendering performance by telling Angular how to identify unique items"],["p",{},"(like a primary key)."],["p",{},"1 <ul>"],["p",{},"2 @for (item of items(); track ",["a",{"href":"http://item.id","rel":["nofollow"]},"item.id"],") {"],["p",{},"3 <li>",["binding",{"value":"[item.name](http://item.name)"}],"</li>"],["p",{},"4 } @empty {"],["p",{},"5 <li>No items found.</li>"],["p",{},"6 }"],["p",{},"7 </ul>"],["p",{},["em",{},"Note the built-in"]," ",["code",{},"@empty"]," ",["em",{},"block! No more wrapping"]," ",["code",{},"ngIf"]," checks around your list.*"],["p",{},"```"],["p",{},"```"],["p",{},"3. @switch - Selection"],["p",{},"Replaces *ngSwitch."],["p",{},"1 @switch (userRole()) {"],["p",{},"2 @case (''admin'') { <admin-dashboard /> }"],["p",{},"3 @case (''user'') { <user-dashboard /> }"],["p",{},"4 @default { <guest-view /> }"],["p",{},"5 }"],["p",{},"```"],["style",{},"html pre.shiki code .sJ8bj, html code.shiki .sJ8bj{--shiki-default:#6A737D;--shiki-dark:#6A737D}html pre.shiki code .sScJk, html code.shiki .sScJk{--shiki-default:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0}html pre.shiki code .sVt8B, html code.shiki .sVt8B{--shiki-default:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8}html pre.shiki code .sZZnC, html code.shiki .sZZnC{--shiki-default:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF}html INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/projects/create-new-database.md', 'Create New Database file', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["pre",{"className":"language-js shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark","code":"/* global use, db */\n// MongoDB Playground\n// Use Ctrl+Space inside a snippet or a string literal to trigger completions.\n\nconst database = ''nr-ntts-namibia'';\nconst collection = ''users'';\n\n// Create a new database.\nuse(database);\n\n// Create a new collection.\ndb.createCollection(collection);\n\n// Create admin user with admin role\n\ndb.createUser({\n  user: \"admin\",\n  pwd: \"MaGano_1531\",\n  roles: [{ role: \"userAdminAnyDatabase\", db: \"admin\" }],\n});\n\n// The prototype form to create a collection:\n/* db.createCollection( <name>,\n  {\n    capped: <boolean>,\n    autoIndexId: <boolean>,\n    size: <number>,\n    max: <number>,\n    storageEngine: <document>,\n    validator: <document>,\n    validationLevel: <string>,\n    validationAction: <string>,\n    indexOptionDefaults: <document>,\n    viewOn: <string>,\n    pipeline: <pipeline>,\n    collation: <document>,\n    writeConcern: <document>,\n    timeseries: { // Added in MongoDB 5.0\n      timeField: <string>, // required for time series collections\n      metaField: <string>,\n      granularity: <string>,\n      bucketMaxSpanSeconds: <number>, // Added in MongoDB 6.3\n      bucketRoundingSeconds: <number>, // Added in MongoDB 6.3\n    },\n    expireAfterSeconds: <number>,\n    clusteredIndex: <document>, // Added in MongoDB 5.3\n  }\n)*/\n\n// More information on the `createCollection` command can be found at:\n// database.\nuse(database);\n\n// Create a new collection.\ndb.createCollection(collection);\n\n// Create admin user with admin role\n\ndb.createUser({\n  user: \"admin\",\n  pwd: \"MaGano_1531\",\n  roles: [{ role: \"root\", db: \"admin\" }],\n});\n\n// The prototype form to create a collection:\n/* db.createCollection( <name>,\n  {\n    capped: <boolean>,\n    autoIndexId: <boolean>,\n    size: timeField: <string>, // required for time series collections\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":40},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},"      metaField: <string>,\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":41},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},"      granularity: <string>,\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":42},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},"      bucketMaxSpanSeconds: <number>, // Added in MongoDB 6.3\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":43},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},"      bucketRoundingSeconds: <number>, // Added in MongoDB 6.3\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":44},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},"    },\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":45},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},"    expireAfterSeconds: <number>,\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":46},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},"    clusteredIndex: <document>, // Added in MongoDB 5.3\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":47},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},"  }\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":48},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},")*/\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":49},["span",{"emptyLinePlaceholder":true},"\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":50},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},"// More information on the `createCollection` command can be found at:\n"]],["span",{"class":"line","line":51},["span",{"class":"sJ8bj"},"// Title at the top: clear and bold"],["p",{},"2. Short subtitle describing the topic"],["p",{},"3. Break down into key sections"],["p",{},"4. INSERT INTO _content_content VALUES ('content/projects/unlocking-user-insights-in-namibia.md', 'Unlocking User Insights', '{"type":"minimark","value":[["p",{},"In many Namibian businesses, websites are still treated as checkbox assets-necessary, yet under-leveraged. Without analytics, there’s no clarity on whether design, messaging, or layout truly engage or convert users. ",["a",{"href":"https://clarity.microsoft.com/","rel":["nofollow"]},"Microsoft Clarity"]," changes the game. As a ",["strong",{},"free"],", robust behavioral analytics tool, Clarity empowers you to unlock heatmaps, session replays, and deep user behavior insights that help optimize your website as a ",["strong",{},"revenue driving asset"],". In this brief article, I’ll explore why Clarity is more than just a fun to have tool, illustrate real-world applications, and offer actionable takeaways, from static online presence to performance-first strategy."],["h3",{"id":"what-makes-microsoft-clarity-stand-out"},"What Makes Microsoft Clarity Stand Out"],["p",{},"Clarity provides unlimited heatmaps, session recordings, and behavior filters all at no cost. That’s a significant value proposition in a region where budgets for premium tools can be tight. Clarity automatically flags key frustration signals like \"rage clicks,\" \"dead clicks,\" and page anomalies, helping you pinpoint UX friction without manually looping through recordings. Moreover Clarity''s script is streamlined and generally faster to load than its competitors, reducing loading speeds or drag."],["p",{},["img",{"alt":"Heatmaps, session recordings & behavior filters all at no cost.","src":"/project-images/inline-img.jpg"}]],["h3",{"id":"use-case-scenario"},"Use Case Scenario"],["h4",{"id":"scenario-an-sme-website-without-analytics"},["strong",{},"Scenario:"]," An SME website without analytics"],["p",{},"A local SME launches a site, sees no engagement, and assumes the issue is marketing. No tools, no insights."],["h4",{"id":"turning-point-implement-clarity"},["strong",{},"Turning Point:"]," Implement Clarity"],["p",{},["strong",{},"They install Microsoft Clarity and start seeing heatmaps and session recordings:"]],["ul",{},["li",{},"Heatmaps highlight buttons that go unseen or CTAs ignored."],["li",{},"Session replays reveal navigation confusion between mobile and desktop users."],["li",{},"Filters expose that users from Google Ads campaigns drop off right away - prompting A/B tests."]],["p",{},["strong",{},"Over time they:"]],["ul",{},["li",{},"Refine messaging hierarchy."],["li",{},"Reposition underperforming CTAs."],["li",{},"Boost conversions and user satisfaction - all without spending on expensive tools."]],["p",{},"Add Clarity to every project from Day 1 and start seeing how real users engage. Use heatmap and session data to make design/driven changes and track impact over time with Trends and Filters."]],"toc":{"title":"","searchDepth":2,"depth":2,"links":[{"id":"what-makes-microsoft-clarity-stand-out","depth":3,"text":"What Makes Microsoft Clarity Stand Out"},{"id":"use-case-scenario","depth":3,"text":"Use Case Scenario"}]}}', 'Why Microsoft Clarity Should Be Your Go-to Analytics Tool', 'md', 'https://clarity.microsoft.com', '/project-images/unlocking-user-insights-in-namibia.jpg', '{}', 'true', '/projects/unlocking-user-insights-in-namibia', '{"title":"Unlocking User Insights","description":"Why Microsoft Clarity Should Be Your Go-to Analytics Tool"}', 'projects/unlocking-user-insights-in-namibia', '["Analytics","Microsoft Clarity","SEO"]', 'C-u6ie2ol2kC65SqF0lRI3Tp7dZeXjrq9XG4QBEJWdc'); -- C-u6ie2ol2kC65SqF0lRI3Tp7dZeXjrq9XG4QBEJWdc
